rules.name: Global Disruption Threshold
rules.description: Risk score above which disruptions auto-escalate to CRITICAL

rules.name: Revenue-at-Risk Threshold
rules.description: Dollar amount above which VP approval is required for mitigation

rules.name: Auto Safety Stock Reorder
rules.description: Allow agent to automatically reorder when stock drops below buffer

rules.name: Multi-Supplier Auto-Escalate
rules.description: Auto-escalate when 3+ suppliers affected by same disruption

rules.name: Off-Hours Escalation
rules.description: Enable PagerDuty notifications outside business hours

rules.name: Approval Timeout
rules.description: Minutes before pending procurement approvals auto-expire

rules.name: Dual Approval for CRITICAL
rules.description: Require two approvers for CRITICAL-level procurement actions

rules.name: Agent Auto-Approve LOW
rules.description: Allow agent to auto-approve LOW severity mitigations
